get.summary: Retrieve an order by its identifier.
get.description: Retrieve an order by its identifier.

status.description:
The lifecycle status of an order.

- `UNSET` — UNSET is the proto3 conventional default value (number = 0).

- `PENDING` — Order has been received and is awaiting processing.
  Sometimes an enum comment might be multi-line.
  What happens then?

- `CONFIRMED` — Order has been accepted and payment verified.

- `SHIPPED` — Order has been handed off to the carrier and is in transit.

- `CANCELLED` — Order was voided before or during fulfillment.

priority.description:
The priority level of a shipment.
This enum carries inline = true, so it is always inlined regardless of the
inlineEnums compiler option.

payment.description: The payment instrument used to complete the transaction.

affectedStatuses.description:
Per-value suppress = false keeps REASON_UNSET visible even when
 suppressDefaultEnumValues = true is set globally.

ReturnReason.description:
The reason a return was initiated.
This enum carries inline = false, so it is always a component schema
regardless of the inlineEnums compiler option.
